THE PROCESS

A clear path from idea to finished build.

This is where the messy parts get sorted. We look at what you need, map out the flow, clean up the details, and build something that feels organized, useful, and easy to use.

Start a Project
BUILD FLOW

No perfect plan needed.

01

Sort

Get the messy pieces out where we can see them.

02

Plan

Turn the rough idea into a clear build direction.

03

Create

Build the page, app screen, system, or working layout.

04

Refine

Clean up the details so it feels finished and ready.

HOW PROJECTS WORK

From messy idea to a clear build plan.

You do not need everything figured out before reaching out. Most projects start with a rough idea, screenshots, notes, or something that feels half-organized. I help clean up the direction, map out what needs to happen, and build it in a way that makes sense.

01

Send what you have

Share the idea, examples, screenshots, current site, rough notes, or anything that helps explain what you are trying to build or fix.

02

Sort the scope

We look at what is actually needed, what can wait, what matters most, and what the first clear version of the project should include.

03

Set the project up

Most new projects go through Upwork so the work, messages, payment, and project history stay organized in one place.

04

Build in clear pieces

I build in stages, send updates, make adjustments, and keep the project moving without making the process feel overwhelming.

WAYS TO WORK TOGETHER

Smaller updates can be hourly. Larger builds are usually set up with milestone pricing so each phase has a clear price, goal, and next step.

Hourly $35/hour Best for quick fixes, edits, updates, and flexible work.
Milestones Set project pricing Best for full websites, app-style builds, dashboards, and larger systems.
THE MILESTONE PATH — PAY AS YOU GO

Larger builds are split into milestones. Each one has its own set price, and you approve and pay one milestone at a time — so there's no big lump sum up front, you always see the work before paying for the next phase, and the project moves forward in clear, low-stress steps.

01
DESIGN DIRECTION

Lock the look

We nail down the brand direction, homepage design, and overall style — so you can see and approve the vibe before the full build begins.

02
BUILD & PAGES

Build it out

The site comes to life: all pages, the menu, your content, and SEO basics — built out, connected, and working together.

03
POLISH & LAUNCH

Go live

Mobile-friendly, social links, final details, and launch. You get a finished site that's ready to share with the world.

Every project is a little different — milestones flex to fit the size and scope of your build. Smaller updates can stay hourly at $35/hour.

Ready to turn the mess into something real?

Send me the idea, even if it is half explained. We’ll figure out the next step from there.

Start a Project →

© 2026 Maggie Dukek.
Built with too many ideas and just enough structure.
BRING THE MESS. I’LL BUILD THE FLOW.
